description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a rectangular main structure, featuring a prominent covered porch at the front supported by wooden posts. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wood planks, and the roof is a simple gable style with visible overhangs. The cabin is surrounded by a row of evergreen trees and includes a detached small shed and a paved patio area with outdoor furniture. Multiple windows of varying sizes are symmetrically distributed along the walls, providing ample natural light to the interior rooms. The main entrance is located beneath the porch, and the interior is divided into several rooms with visible furnishings such as beds, sofas, and tables.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a gable roof, covered front porch, symmetrical windows, and a detached shed, surrounded by evergreen trees and a patio area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, and symmetrical window arrangement, with evergreen trees and the detached shed visible in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the cabin, the row of trees along the side, and the paved patio area with outdoor furniture and the detached shed.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with multiple windows, the full row of trees, and the patio area with pink furniture and the shed to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cabin's side rooms, the covered porch from the side, and the alignment of the trees and patio area.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs and a covered porch extension, constructed from wood or similar material
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows of medium size are symmetrically distributed along the front and rear facades, with some grouped in pairs and others spaced individually; all windows are vertically oriented.
attribute_door_placement: One main exterior door is centered on the front facade beneath the porch; no other exterior doors are visible in the images.
